scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACK,FRONT" --prefix-colors "bgMagenta.bold,bgCyan.bold" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.quality: npm run quality:backend && npm run quality:frontend
scripts.quality:backend: npm ci --prefix backend && npm test --prefix backend && npm run prisma:generate
scripts.quality:frontend: npm ci --prefix frontend && npm run lint --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
